Body Fat Percentage Calculator

Estimate your body fat percentage using the U.S. Navy method. Enter your measurements below for an accurate estimate.

FAQ

How is body fat percentage calculated?

This calculator uses the U.S. Navy method which estimates body fat from neck, waist, and hip (for women) circumference measurements along with height.

What is a healthy body fat percentage?

For men: 10-20% is considered fit, 20-25% average. For women: 18-28% is fit, 28-32% average.

How accurate is this method?

The Navy method is accurate within 3-4% of more precise methods like DEXA scans for most people.
